name: tramstec
description: MCP server connecting AI agents to WhatsApp Business for sales, support, and payments. Mexico-first with SPEI, OXXO, and CFDI invoicing. Bring your own AI (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, n8n, custom).

transports.notes: Multi-tenant. API key issued after self-serve checkout.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_message
tools.description: Send a text WhatsApp message in an existing conversation. Respects opt-out and human-approval gates.

tools.name: whatsapp_send_template
tools.description: Send a Meta-approved WhatsApp template. Requires opt-in.

tools.name: customer_lookup
tools.description: Find a contact by phone or id. Returns recent orders and open conversation.

tools.name: product_search
tools.description: Catalog search by name, SKU, or description.

tools.name: order_create_draft
tools.description: Create an order in draft status. Does not auto-confirm.

tools.name: order_confirm
tools.description: Confirm a draft order with explicit customer evidence.

tools.name: payment_link_create
tools.description: Generate a checkout link via Mercado Pago, Stripe, or mock provider.

tools.name: spei_instructions_generate
tools.description: Generate Mexican SPEI bank-transfer instructions with a unique reference.

tools.name: handoff_to_human
tools.description: Escalate conversation to a human operator with structured reason, urgency, and summary.

tools.name: conversation_summarize
tools.description: Produce a structured digest of the recent conversation thread.

tools.name: consent_update
tools.description: Apply opt-in or opt-out with auditable evidence.

prompts.name: template_suggestion_agent
prompts.description: Suggests Meta-approved templates for proactive messages.

compliance: PCI DSS pass-through via Stripe (we never store card data)
